summary: PR 2573 made a focused data-matching update in src/melee/gr/grinishie1.c. The diff fills grI1_803E4950 stage-data callback slots, adjusts report/assert strings, comments out a separate grinishie1.c string symbol in favor of an inline literal at one OSReport call, and changes one assert label from new_gobj to map_gobj. The only feedback evidence is an automated report showing .data improvement for main/melee/gr/grinishie1 from 55.52% to 89.65% and a tiny grInishie1_801FB3F0 score change.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; contains grInishie1 stage data, report/assert strings, and related stage functions adjusted for matching.

what_changed.text: Updated invalid_state(line) to report with format "%s:%d: oioi..\n" and string argument "i!=HATENA_APPEAR_CHECKLOOP" instead of reporting filename "grinishie1.c" with "%s:%d: oioi...".

Filled previously NULL grI1_803E4950 stage-data entries with grI1_803E48F4 and grInishie1 callback/function pointers grInishie1_801FA90C, grInishie1_801FA908, grInishie1_801FA984, grInishie1_801FA988, grInishie1_801FA9AC, grInishie1_801FCBB0, and grInishie1_801FCBB8.
Commented out char grI1_803E49A8[] = "grinishie1.c" and changed the related OSReport call to pass the inline literal "grinishie1.c" directly.
Adjusted an assert message in grInishie1_801FB3F0_inline from "%s:%d: oioi..." to "%s:%d: oioi..\n".
Changed an assert string in fn_801FBF6C after Ground_801C2BA4(3) failure from "new_gobj" to "map_gobj".

smart_moves.text: The PR kept the change narrowly scoped to one stage translation unit and one matching objective, avoiding broad unrelated cleanup.

The OSReport filename was kept as an inline literal at the callsite instead of relying on a separate char data symbol, which aligns with the loaded no-string-literal-symbol-regression standard when a code/matching PR does not prove separate data ownership.
evidence_refs: raw_diff hunk changing OSReport argument to "grinishie1.c"

decomp_lessons.lesson: For stage-data matching, check whether initializer NULL slots are actually known callback/function pointers before treating the data table as incomplete or opaque.
evidence_refs: raw_diff hunk near grI1_803E4950 replacing NULL entries with callback/function pointers

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small string literal details in assert/report text, including newline placement and exact labels, can materially affect data matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff hunk changing oioi... to oioi..\n
raw_diff hunk changing new_gobj to map_gobj

naming_conventions.name: map_gobj
naming_conventions.context: Assert string used when Ground_801C2BA4(3) returns NULL in fn_801FBF6C.
naming_conventions.notes: Evidence supports this exact string in this PR slice; it does not prove a global naming convention.

naming_conventions.name: i!=HATENA_APPEAR_CHECKLOOP
naming_conventions.context: String argument used in invalid_state(line) OSReport.
naming_conventions.notes: Evidence supports this exact report string only for grinishie1.c.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Improve data-section matching by correcting table initializer entries and exact string literals rather than adding broad dummy storage.
evidence_refs: raw_diff hunk near assert/report string changes
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The slice includes automated score output but no author explanation, objdiff details, or adjacent regression discussion.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use inline filename literal at OSReport callsite after removing/commenting a separate filename char symbol.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: This is consistent with loaded string-literal standards, but the PR itself does not explain data ownership reasoning.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 showed two improvements in unmatched items: main/melee/gr/grinishie1 .data +139 bytes from 55.52% to 89.65%, and grInishie1_801FB3F0 80.43% to 80.44% with 0 bytes.
No review comments or reviews are present in the loaded slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Stage-data tables may need real callback/function pointers instead of placeholder NULLs
accepted_candidate_records.text: In grinishie1.c, replacing multiple NULL entries in grI1_803E4950 with known grInishie1 callback/function pointers coincided with a large automated .data improvement for main/melee/gr/grinishie1.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Exact assert/report strings can be data-matching work
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR adjusted exact report/assert strings in grinishie1.c, including newline spelling and the map_gobj label, as part of a data-matching PR with automated .data improvement.
evidence_refs: raw_diff hunks near invalid_state, grInishie1_801FB3F0_inline, and fn_801FBF6C

source_update_candidates.title: grinishie1.c contains stage-data and assert/report string data-matching points
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/gr/grinishie1.c includes grI1_803E4950 stage data, grInishie1 callback/function pointers, and assert/report strings that affected automated .data matching in PR 2573.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-scoped lookup aid for future grinishie1 matching work; should be curator-reviewed before adding as a path fact.

source_update_candidates.title: Do not create filename string globals solely for report/assert data matching
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2573 commented out a separate grI1_803E49A8 filename string and used the inline literal "grinishie1.c" at the OSReport callsite while improving .data. This may reinforce the existing no-string-literal-symbol-regression standard, but the slice lacks author explanation and should not be promoted without curator comparison against more PRs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff hunk changing OSReport argument to inline "grinishie1.c"
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible reinforcement/example for an existing standard rather than a new accepted rule.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that every grinishie1 callback pointer listed in this PR has a proven semantic role beyond its symbol identity; the slice only shows table placement.
Do not generalize map_gobj or HATENA_APPEAR_CHECKLOOP into project-wide naming conventions from this one diff.
Do not claim full function or object match; the bot report only lists .data and a small grInishie1_801FB3F0 percentage improvement.
